column4:
🎉 Welcome to Aside! This is your personal space to save anything from anywhere. Just text it here.

Here's how it works:
- Text me anything you want to remember: quotes, links, recipes, random ideas, you name it
- Add a hashtag like #movies or #recipes to keep things organized
- Everything you save lives in your dashboard, ready when you need it

🤔 Questions? Just text me "Hey Aside..." and ask away

💬 Got feedback or found something weird? We'd love to hear it: textaside.app/feedback

🔗 Your dashboard: [dashboard magic link]

column4:
I'm here to help! 

Common questions:
- How does Aside work?
- How do I create a board?
- How do I add to a board?
- What's my dashboard link?
- How do I invite a friend?

Text "Hey Aside..." followed by any question and I'll do my best to answer.

Reply STOP to unsubscribe. Msg&Data rates may apply.
column5: User texts "help", "I need help", or similar

column4:
Aside lets you save anything just by texting it here!

Here's how it works:
- Text me anything you want to remember: quotes, links, recipes, random ideas, you name it  
- Add a hashtag like #movies or #recipes to keep things organized  
- Everything you save lives in your dashboard, ready when you need it   

🤔 Questions? Just text me "Hey Aside..." followed by your question and I'll help out.   

💬 Got feedback or found something weird? We'd love to hear about it: textaside.app/feedback

column3: "How do I add something to my dashboard?"
column4:
Just text me whatever you want to save and it'll show up in your dashboard automatically. 

Want to organize things? Add hashtags like #recipes or #movies. 

🔗 Your dashboard: [dashboard magic link]

Super easy! Just add a hashtag to any message. 

Like this: "Check out this recipe #dinner"

That'll create a #dinner board automatically.

All your boards live in your dashboard. 🔗 See all your boards: [dashboard magic link]

column3: "How do I add something to a board?"
column4:
Just include the hashtag in your message!

Like: "This movie looks great #watchlist"

🔗 Your dashboard: [dashboard magic link]

column3: "How do I create a shared board?"
column4:
Head to your dashboard. You can either create a new shared board or convert a private one.   

🔗 Your dashboard: [dashboard magic link]   

For a new shared board: Click the + next to Shared Boards in the menu and follow the prompts.   

To convert a private board: Go to the private board and click the Invite button in the upper right corner, then follow the prompts.

column3: "How do I invite someone to a shared board?"
column4:
Go to your dashboard, open the shared board, and click the Invite button in the upper right corner.   

Easy as that!   

🔗 Your dashboard: [dashboard magic link]

🔗 Here you go: [dashboard magic link]   

💡 Pro tip: Add Aside to your home screen for one-tap access!

Here's what you've got:  

- #board-name  
- #board-name 
- #board-name   

🔗 Your dashboard: [dashboard magic link]

column3: "I accidentally sent something to the wrong board. How do I move the item to the correct board?"
column4:
No worries! Go to your dashboard, find the item, and click the edit icon. You can move it wherever you want.   

🔗 Your dashboard: [dashboard magic link]

column3: "How do I delete an item from a board?"
column4:
Head to your dashboard, find the item you want to remove, and click the delete icon. Done!   

🔗 Your dashboard: [dashboard magic link]

Go to your dashboard, open the board you want to delete, and click the Delete button in the upper right corner. That's it!   

🔗 Your dashboard: [dashboard magic link]
